english: coat, záṅs-kyis (zangs kyis) Glr.; to wrap up, to envelop, v. ytúm-pa (gtum pa).
barren, sterile; addled (eggs); blo-_túms (blo 'thums) stupid Lexx.

to rise, to spread, of smoke, vapours, perfumes, ga-pur _túl (ga pur 'thul) it smells of camphor Lex.; rdul mi _túl-bar byás-pai _óg-tu (rdul mi 'thul bar byas pa'i 'og tu) after having laid the dust Dzl.; la-lás bdug-spós _tul (la las bdug spos 'thul) some persons were spreading perfumes Pth.

Cs. to set out on a journey. (To me only *tág-ċe* (*thag ce*) W. is known.) 1. to pack up. 2. to depart. It prob. signifies the same as tég-pa (theg pa), _dégs-pa ('degs pa) to lift, raise, take up, cf. ɣźi btág-ċes (gzhi btag ces), or _degs-pa ('degs pa) to shift, to change, lodgings, to remove; teg-kúg (theg kug) carpet-bag, knapsack.

perh. only another spelling for teṅ (theng); Sch. has _téṅ-la _bór-ba ('theng la 'bor ba) to throw away as unfit, and if that be correct, it may serve to explain both significations mentioned under teṅ (theng).
Cs. to be lame, to go lame, cf. téṅ-po (theng po); also adj.: bsu-mkán byiu _teṅ-ma ċig kyaṅ (bsu mkhan byi'u 'theng ma cig kyang) med not even a lame chicken came to meet me Mil. nt.

1. to draw, to pull, gyén-la (gyen la) up, upward, mdún-du (mdun du) forth, out; pár _ten tsur _ten (phar 'then tshur 'then) they pulled to and fro, this way and that way Pth.; nur-gyis (nur gyis) by jerks, by little and little Glr.; yól-ba _tén-pa (yol ba 'then pa) a curtain drawn before Glr.; *u' _tén-ċe* (*u' 'then ce*) W. to draw breath, to breathe; in W. esp. used for to draw out (a cork) to take off (a pot-lid), to draw or take away (a pot from the fire). - 2. to stop, to stop short, to wait, _tén-pa bzaṅ ('then pa bzang) it will be advisable to stop, to wait. - In W. also = rtén-pa (rten pa) to lean, recline, repose on. - *gór-la tén-ċe* (*gor la then ce*) W. to form on a lathe, to turn. - Sch.: _ten-_kyér ('then 'khyer) forgetting and remembering (?).

overplus, extra, supernumerary, gos-_téb (gos 'theb) a supernumerary dress Lex.; mal-gos _teb-kyis _túm-pa (mal gos 'theb kyis 'thum pa) to wrap up in an extra blanket Lex.; źag ɣċig _teb (zhag gcig 'theb) one day over, or too much; _téb-pa ('theb pa) to have too much (?) Sch.

pf. tebs (thebs), (prop. the passive or neuter vb. to _débs-pa ('debs pa), but often not differing from it, v. _débs-pa ('debs pa)) 1. to be thrown, strewed, scattered, sá-bon (sa bon) Mil.; to be afflicted with, befallen by, nád-kyis (nad kyis) a disease, frq., also with lús-la (lus la) Glr.; lan _tébs-pa (lan 'thebs pa) to answer; ɣsal _tébs-pa (gsal 'thebs pa) to be explained minutely; to be understood perfectly Thgr. - 2. W. to be hit or struck (= kés-pa (khes pa)); *i-ru teb soṅ* (*i ru theb song*) I have been hit here (stung, bitten etc.); *teb ċúg-te toṅ* (*theb cug te tong*) put it down, hitting (the right place), i.e. put it just in its proper place; *mi téb-ċe* (*mi theb ce*) not to hit the mark, to miss the aim; *ma teb* (*ma theb*) the blow did not strike home; even of a prayer is said: *teb* (*theb*), it has hit, it has been heard. - 3. Cs. in a general sense: to take, seize, hold fast; _tebs-lċíb ('thebs lcib) Cs.: 'a tailor's instrument for holding fast cloth etc. in sewing; a thimble'; but the latter is undoubtedly to be spelled mteb (mtheb) (or teb (theb))-lċibs (lcibs); v. lċibs (lcibs).

Cs.: 'to shut, comprise, cover, include; v. _tams-pa ('thams pa)'; the Lexx. have only: nan-ċágs-_téms (nan cags 'thems), and _tems-nán ('thems nan) w. e. In W. it is 1. vb. n. to _tams-pa ('thams pa): *lág-pa tem* (*lag pa them*) my hand has been squeezed in, *tém-ċei ċá-lag* (*them ce'i ca lag*) a thing (e.g. a machine) giving chances of being squeezed. - 2. to suffice, = _kyéd-pa ('khyed pa), ldaṅ-ba (ldang ba).
Cs. = ɣtóg-pa (gtog pa), Sch. also = _tág-pa ('thag pa).

pf. and imp. _togs ('thogs), 1. to take, to seize, to take up, a knife, a sword Dzl., provisions in order to distribute them Dzl., esp. to carry Dzl. and elsewh.; ról-mo _tógs-pa (rol mo 'thogs pa) Glr., Tar. 21, 16, prob. to carry musical instruments (or to make music?); = tób-pa (thob pa) to receive, *mii lus togs re-ré* (*mi'i lus thogs re re*), or togs tsád (*thogs tshad*) all that have received human bodies by the metempsychosis C., W. - 2. = _dógs-pa ('dogs pa) with paṅ (pang), frq., v. _dógs-pa ('dogs pa); Tar. 159,16 = to name, to call.
